title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya

✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

title: 東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ VS. 稲葉浩志 - Action / THE FIRST TAKE
tags: the first take|firsttake|ファーストテイク|ふぁーすとていく|一発撮り|TFT|音楽|東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ|スカパラ|すかぱら|TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA|稲葉浩志|いなばこうし|Koshi Inaba|B'z|ビーズ|びーず|Action|アクション|あくしょん
description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第646回は、日本を代表する9人組スカバンド・東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが、ゲストアーティストにB'z稲葉浩志を迎えて「THE FIRST TAKE」に初登場。
今回披露するのは、”戦うように一緒に音楽を作っていく”というコンセプトのもと、楽曲制作から共同で作り上げていくという音楽プロジェクト「VS.シリーズ」の１曲であり、稲葉浩志とのコラボレーションが話題となった「Action」。
「人生を気楽に、だけど戦うように楽しんでほしい」という想いが込められており、東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが持つパワフルなスカサウンドと、稲葉浩志の圧倒的な歌唱力と表現力が融合した本楽曲を、「THE FIRST TAKE」だけの情熱ほとばしるスペシャルパフォーマンスで一発撮り。

STREAMING & DOWNLOAD: https://tokyoska.lnk.to/Action

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.

Episode 646 features the first appearance of one of Japan’s leading ska bands, TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA, along with guest artist Koshi Inaba from B’z on THE FIRST TAKE.
They will perform “Action,” a song that has attracted considerable attention as a collaboration with Koshi Inaba. The song is part of the VS. Series—a musical project by TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA,  based on the concept of “creating music together as if in battle,” with collaboration beginning at the production stage.
Enjoy this special one-shot performance, burning with passion as TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA’s powerful ska sound fuses with Koshi Inaba’s masterful and expressive vocals, carrying the message to “enjoy life and take it easy, but with the intensity of a battle,” exclusively on THE FIRST TAKE.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: ふみの / ホットライン -Music Video-
description:
3/13(金)19:00
ふみの 'ホットライン' Music Video

 ▼Download & Streaming
https://lnk.to/fumino_hl

*******

ホットライン

Lyrics:ふみの , 
Music:ふみの

おもしろいもの見つけたら一番に教えて
家族でさえもそこだけは絶対にゆずれない
いいでしょ？

答えのある２択でも真剣に答えて
大事なことは君に一緒に決めてほしいの
いいでしょ？

君が赤をとるなら青をとるし
地獄に行くなら仕方ないけどついていくよ
なんかそんな感じ

君の見る世界は特別で
私には到底理解できないけど
半分だけ教えてくれ
分かち合いたいんだ

もし辛いことがあるなら
涙を見せるのは私にしてよ
なぐさめとかできないけど
ただそばにいさせてよ


ずっと私ばかりだって思ってたけど
知っちゃったの長く会えなかった時に
こっそり占い師に相談したこと

君ってほんと顔に出づらいのに
基本受け身で全然分からないの
そこんとこどうなの？

君の特別は増えてくばっかね
私のことより好きにならないでおいてね
なんかさびしいじゃない

私のいる世界の住人は
君が大半を占めてるけどさ
そっちの方はどうなんだい？
引っ越してしまいたい！

2人なら世界も変えられる
なんてバカなセリフも真面目にうたうよ
だって本当は君のほうも
そう思ってることだってなくもなくもないだろう


八方美人の君も良いんだけど
私の前でだけ性格が悪くなる
君が好き

君の見る世界は特別で
私には到底理解できないけど
半分だけ教えてくれ
分かち合いたいんだよ

あ、そうだ！そんなことより
いつものカラオケ行こうよ
終わる頃には
全部忘れて
笑っているよ

*******

〈ふみのプロフィール〉
BMSG×ちゃんみなが手がけたガールズグループオーディション「No No Girls」 に参加し、
約7,000人の応募者の中から最終選考まで進出したファイナリスト10名の一人。
静謐な弾き語りから躍動感あふれるバンドサウンドまで、自由自在にその世界観を展開する。
2026年1月11日、活動名を「ふみの」とし、
ちゃんみなが主宰する新たなセルフプロデュース型レーベル 「NO LABEL ARTISTS」 の第一弾アーティストとしてデビュー。
デビュー曲「favorite song」は“JAPAN Hot 100” 9位を記録し、MVは公開20時間で100万回再生を突破するなど話題に。
そんなふみのが送り出す、3月13日リリースの2ndシングル「ホットライン」は、自身の作詞・作曲による楽曲。
ちゃんみなから プレゼントされた「favorite song」でデビューし、今作は、ふみのがシンガーソングライターとして活動していく、記念すべき楽曲となる。

＜STORY＞
199X年、世界は核の炎につつまれた!!
海は枯れ、地は裂け、あらゆる生命が絶滅したかにみえた……。
だが…人類は死滅していなかった……!!

In the year 199X, the world is engulfed in a nuclear inferno! The seas have vanished. The earth lies in ruins. It seems all life has been wiped out...but humanity has not perished!

＜INTRODUCTION＞
原作・武論尊、漫画・原哲夫によって生み出された伝説のアクション漫画『北斗の拳』。1983年、『週刊少年ジャンプ』にて連載を開始した本作は、圧倒的な画力で描かれる世界観とキャラクタービジュアル、そして究極の暗殺拳“北斗神拳”で悪を倒す主人公・ケンシロウの生き様が読者の心を鷲掴みにしてきた。
そして、2026年――。
『北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-』として、新たなスタッフ・キャストと最新の映像技術によって原作の魅力を余すことなくアニメ化する。世紀末を生きる漢（おとこ）たちの闘いが、令和の時代に新たな伝説を刻む――！

The legendary action manga Fist of the North Star, written by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara, first began serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump in 1983. With its overwhelmingly powerful artwork, striking world-building, and unforgettable characters, the story of protagonist Kenshiro—who defeats evil with the deadly martial art, Hokuto Shinken—captivated readers from the very start.
And now, in 2026, Fist of the North Star will be reborn as a new anime, brought to life by an all-new team of creators and voice actors, and powered by the latest animation technology.
The brutal saga of men in a ruined world returns to forge a new legend!

凶悪な犯罪に⼿を染めながらも⼗分な裁きを受けず、反省もしない犯罪者たち。
そんな無法者たちに被害者に代わって、制裁を加える男たちがいた。

https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

▪️書簡型小説「二人称」
著者：n-buna
2026年2月26日（木）講談社より発売
販売サイト↓
https://yorushika.lnk.to/second-person

貴方の目の前に一通の茶封筒があります。封を開けて中を確認すると、折りたたまれた数枚の原稿用紙が入っているのが見えました。貴方はふと、それに目を通したいという衝動に駆られました。

【あらすじ】
「チラシを拝見しました。もしよろしければ、僕の作品を添削していただけないでしょうか？」
一通の手紙から始まった、詩を書く少年と文学に詳しい「先生」の奇妙な文通。
「君はこれから、途方もなく広い砂の海から、たった一粒の琥珀を見つけなければいけない」
先生の言葉に導かれ、少年は言葉と世界を知っていく。
だがある日、手紙のやりとりに潜むかすかな違和感に気づいて──。
密かな文通は、やがて思わぬ真実へとつながっていく。
「先生、先生はどういう人なんですか？」
実際の封筒と手紙を一枚ずつ開く体験を通してヨルシカが描く、まったく新しい“書簡型小説”。

▪️「二人称」特設サイト

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: El Día de la Revelación | Tráiler Oficial (Universal Pictures) - HD
tags: Trailer|Día de la Revelación|thriller|Steven Spielberg|Amblin Entertainment|Emily Blunt|Josh O’Connor|Colin Firth|Eve Hewson|Colman Domingo
description:
El mundo merece saber. El Día de la Revelación, 11 de junio solo en cines.

Síguenos en facebook: https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesMX   
Encuéntranos en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/universalmx   
Síguenos en Twitter: https://x.com/UniversalMX  
Síguenos en TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@universalpicturesmx  
Encuéntranos en Threads: https://www.threads.net/@universalmx  
http://www.diadelarevelacion-pelicula.mx 

Dirigida por: Steven Spielberg
Escrita por: David Koepp
Historia de: Steven Spielberg
Productores: Kristie Macosko Krieger con Steven Spielberg
Productores Ejecutivos: Adam Somner con Chris Brigham
Elenco: Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson con Colman Domingo

Si descubrieras que no estamos solos, si alguien te lo mostrara, te lo demostrara, ¿te asustaría?

En 2026, la verdad le pertenece a 7 mil millones de personas.

Nos acercamos al día de la revelación.

Universal Pictures estrena un evento cinematográfico creado y dirigido por Steven Spielberg. La película es protagonizada por la ganadora del SAG y nominada al Oscar® Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, Un lugar en silencio), el ganador del Emmy y el Golden Globe Josh O’Connor (Desafiantes, The Crown), el ganador del Oscar® Colin Firth (El discurso del rey, la franquicia Kingsman), Eve Hewson (Malas hermanas, La pareja perfecta) y el nominado al Oscar® Colman Domingo (Las vidas de Sing Sing, Rustin).

Basada en una historia de Spielberg, el guion es de David Koepp, que anteriormente trabajó con Spielberg incluyendo los guiones de Jurassic Park, El mundo perdido: Jurassic Park, La guerra de los mundos e Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal. Combinadas, estas películas han recaudado más de 3 mil millones de dólares a nivel mundial. Koepp también escribió el guion de Jurassic World: Renace de 2025.

El día de la revelación es producida por la cinco veces nominada al Premio de la Academia® Kristie Macosko Krieger (Los Fabelman, Amor sin barreras) y por Spielberg para Amblin Entertainment. Los productores ejecutivos son Adam Somner y Chris Brighman. 

Steven Spielberg es uno de los cineastas más exitosos e influyentes de la industria. El director con más ventas de la historia, Spielberg ha liderado éxitos como Tiburón, E.T. El extraterrestre y las franquicias de Indiana Jones y Jurassic Park. 

Entre sus innumerables honores, es 3 veces ganador del Premio de la Academia®, incluyendo Oscars® a Mejor Director y Mejor Película para La Lista de Schindler, que recibió un total de siete Oscar®, y a Mejor Director por Salvando al Soldado Ryan. Su más reciente película, Los Fabelman, estrenó por Universal en 2022 y recibió siete nominaciones al Premio de la Academia®, incluyendo Dirección, Mejor Guion Original, Mejor Actriz y Mejor Película.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

ท่ามกลางกระแสธารที่เชี่ยวกรากของโลกธุรกิจ "ความภักดี" ถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือชิ้นสุดท้ายในการทำลายคู่แข่ง เมื่อ 'ชลลดา' หญิงสาวผู้รับคำสั่งจากครอบครัว ต้องแทรกซึมเข้าไปในโรงแรมของ 'อาโป' ผู้บริหารสาวนิ่งลึกที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าเดาใจยากที่สุด เพื่อล้วงความลับ อำนาจและความโลภกำลังจะเปลี่ยนโชคชะตาของเธอทั้งคู่ไปตลอดกาล

⏳เมื่อความลับที่ต้องล้วง กลายเป็นเงื่อนไขบีบบังคับหัวใจ 💞 เมื่อความใกล้ชิดถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือเข้าหาเป้าหมายที่ดูอันตรายกว่าที่คิด และเมื่อ "แผนลวง" ที่ต้องทำให้แนบเนียน กลับกลายเป็นความรู้สึกที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

ภารกิจที่เริ่มจากผลประโยชน์ แต่ต้องเดิมพันด้วยหัวใจของคนสองคน
เล่ห์กลที่เดิมพันด้วยความแค้น กำลังจะกลายเป็นสายใยรักที่นิรันดร์ 

น้ำนิ่งไหลลึก ยิ่งถลำลึกลงไป ยิ่งอันตรายเกินกว่าจะถอนตัว 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

🔥 Bước vào ngày thi đấu của nhánh 1-0, Swiss Stage hứa hẹn sẽ tiếp tục bùng nổ với những màn so tài đỉnh cao giữa các đội tuyển đang có khởi đầu thuận lợi. Một chiến thắng nữa sẽ giúp họ tiến thẳng đến nhánh 2-0 đầy lợi thế, trong khi thất bại sẽ kéo các đội trở lại thế cân bằng tại nhánh 1-1.

description:
Một hành trình nghệ thuật nơi triết lý “vị nhân sinh” của Văn Phú gặp gỡ những giai điệu giàu chiêm nghiệm từ Phan Mạnh Quỳnh. Muôn Vị Nhân Sinh không chỉ kể một câu chuyện bằng âm nhạc mà còn đồng hành cùng những nỗ lực thầm lặng và những thử thách mỗi người phải kiên định bước qua trong cuộc sống. Trên hành trình trưởng thành ấy, điều ý nghĩa nhất không nằm ở việc trở thành một ai khác, mà ở sự bền bỉ để mỗi ngày tiến về phía trước và trở thành phiên bản tốt hơn của chính mình so với ngày hôm qua.

Lyrics:

Ver 1:

Đèn vừa lên khu phố nối theo cảnh hoàng hôn, 
Người đã có niềm vui quây quần, 
Người loay hoay còn trong ca muộn, 
Chuyên Tâm thật miệt mài. 

Và nhìn qua ô kính thấy muôn câu chuyện giống nhau: 
Khó khăn sống những ngày ban đầu 
Vì người mà cố gắng phút giây.

Pre-chorus: 
  Giữa nơi phố quen, lắm huyên náo 
Nên đôi lần mơ một nơi chốn mình thuộc về, 
Để được lắng nghe chính ta, 
Gắn bó thiết tha 
Và hằng ngày nghe tâm hồn mình mở ra. 

Điệp khúc:
Ai cũng xứng đáng có nơi gọi là nhà,
Để được sống hơn chính mình ngày hôm qua. 
Bởi dù bao đêm lặng lẽ, ánh sáng nhỏ bé,  
Bạn đã không quay lưng với giấc mơ này.

Từ nơi đây xin quan tâm mình nữa nhé, 
Hãy nhiệt huyết cũng hãy vui khi nghỉ ngơi. 
Món quà vô giá: bình yên,  hạnh phúc gọi tên. 
Mỗi ngày để yêu thương được lớn thêm.


Ver 2:
Hằng ngày được ở trong chính tổ ấm, 
Bạn mỉm cười vì hằng biết ơn lao động. 
Hiện tại và cả phía trước 
Những kỷ niệm thật đẹp!

Dù từng ngày, đôi chân ta đi qua muôn vị nhân sinh
Thì dịu êm khi mở cánh cửa nhà mình. 
Nhớ lại từ gian nan ta bước đến, 
Thở phào rồi phiền lo dần nhẹ tênh. 

Pre-chorus:
Giữa nơi phố quen, lắm huyên náo 
Nhưng nay tìm thấy một nơi chốn mình thuộc về, 
Để được lắng nghe chính ta, 
Gắn bó thiết tha 
Và hằng ngày nghe tâm hồn mình mở ra.

description:
মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া | Moyaj Ali | Nasheed Film

মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া ইসলামিক গজলটি আমাদের সেরা সৃষ্টিগুলোর একটি। মোয়াজ আলী এর সুমধুর কন্ঠে এই গানটি শুনুন ও ভালোলাগার মধ্যে হারিয়ে যান। 

গানটির লিরিক্স ও সুর এমনভাবে তৈরি করা হয়েছে যা আপনার হৃদয় ছুঁয়ে যাবে। নাশিদ ফিল্ম এর গুণগত মানসম্পন্ন ভিডিও নির্মাণ ও সাউন্ড ডিজাইন আপনার পছন্দের তালিকাতে জায়গা করে নিবে।

আপনি যদি আপনার আশেপাশে প্রতিভাবান ইসলামিক সংগীতশিল্পী বাচ্চাদের চেনেন, তাহলে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন। আমরা তাদের প্রতিভা তুলে ধরতে সহযোগিতা করতে চাই।

আমাদের আরও বেশ কিছু জনপ্রিয় গজল শুনতে লিঙ্কটি চেক করুন। নতুন গজল পেতে চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন ও ভিডিওটি শেয়ার করতে ভুলবেন না।

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

21 Ramzan Noha 2026 dedicated to the martyrdom of Maula Ali (AS), the great leader of Ahlul Bayt. This recitation remembers the tragic event in Masjid-e-Kufa when Hazrat Ali ibn Abi Talib was struck by Ibn-e-Muljim during Fajr prayer. The sorrowful day of 21 Ramadan marks the departure of the Commander of the Faithful whose life was a symbol of justice, courage and devotion to Islam.
This spiritual kalam recalls the sacrifice of the first Imam and the grief felt by believers around the world. The remembrance of Shahadat-e-Ali is observed every year in the holy month of Ramazan as lovers of Ameer-ul-Momineen gather to pay tribute to the legacy of the Lion of Allah. His teachings of truth, patience and humanity continue to guide the Ummah.
This latest Ramazan 2026 release honors the memory of the noble personality who was wounded in Kufa and later left this world on the 21st of the blessed month. The tragedy connected with Ibn Muljim remains one of the most emotional moments in Islamic history, remembered through recitations, elegies and gatherings dedicated to the virtues of Imam-e-Adil.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Sohna Nabi PBUH | Ali Zafar | Naat
tags: mera sohna nabi|mera sohna nabi ali zafar|mera sohna nabi pbuh|ali zafar naat|ali zafar mera sohna nabi|mera sohna nabi naat|mera sohna nabi full naat|mera sohna nabi lyrics|mera sohna nabi status|ali zafar naat 2026|naat sharif|islamic naat|beautiful naat|heart touching naat|emotional naat|best naat sharif|islamic video|urdu naat sharif|pakistan naat|ramzan naat|ramadan naat|islamic naat video|trending naat|viral naat|ali zafar islamic naat
description:
Sohna Nabi is not just a naat. It is an expression of love and remembrance.
We live in a time when the world feels louder, harsher, and more divided than ever before. In such moments, hearts instinctively search for something pure, something constant, something that reminds us of who we are meant to be. The life of the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ remains one of the most powerful reminders of that truth.

His message was not only spiritual, it was deeply human. In a world fractured by ego, power, and division, he taught mercy over anger, compassion over cruelty, humility over pride. The guidance he brought into the world offers a timeless roadmap for how human beings can coexist with dignity, justice, and compassion in their hearts for one another.
Centuries have passed, yet the light of that example continues to reach hearts across languages, cultures, and generations. It reminds us that the path to peace in the world begins with peace within ourselves.

Sohna Nabi is simply a reflection of that love, that reverence, and that longing that lives quietly in the hearts of millions.

Peace and blessings be upon the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, always.

Doodh hai ilaaj marz ka

Haan shahadat-e-Ali (a.s) ke din

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

While trying to rebuild a life from nothing, Peter notices Angelica Jones portrayed by Sadie Sink, a college student dealing with strange changes she cannot explain as her body begins to release unstable heat and electromagnetic energy. Their stories move in parallel as Peter searches for meaning in a life where he no longer belongs to anyone, while Angelica faces the truth that her powers cannot be ignored forever. title: DIA D | Trailer Oficial (Universal Pictures) - HD
tags: Trailer|Dia D|thriller|Steven Spielberg|Amblin Entertainment|Emily Blunt|Josh O’Connor|Colin Firth|Eve Hewson|Colman Domingo
description:
As pessoas merecem saber. #DiaDFilme estreia dia 11 de junho nos cinemas.

Siga nosso perfil no Facebook: www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesBR
Siga nosso perfil no Instagram: www.instagram.com//universalpicsbr
Siga nosso perfil no X: www.x.com/UniversalPicsBr
http://www.diadfilme.com.br

Diretor: Steven Spielberg
Escrito por: David Koepp
Story by: Steven Spielberg
Produtores: Kristie Macosko Krieger and Steven Spielberg
Produtores Executivos: Adam Somner and Chris Brigham
Elenco: Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson e Colman Domingo

Se você descobrisse que não estamos sozinhos, se alguém lhe mostrasse, provasse isso, isso te assustaria?

Neste ano, a verdade pertence a sete bilhões de pessoas.

Estamos nos aproximando do… Dia D.

A Universal Pictures tem orgulho de lançar um novo filme original, criado e dirigido por Steven Spielberg. O filme é estrelado pela vencedora do SAG Award e indicada ao Oscar® Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, Um Lugar Silencioso), pelo vencedor do Emmy e do Globo de Ouro Josh O’Connor (Rivais, The Crown), pelo vencedor do Oscar® Colin Firth (O Discurso do Rei, franquia Kingsman), Eve Hewson (Mal de Família, O Casal Perfeito) e pelo duas vezes indicado ao Oscar® Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).

Baseado em uma história de Spielberg, o roteiro é assinado por David Koepp, que já colaborou com o diretor nos roteiros de Jurassic Park, Jurassic Park: O Mundo Perdido, Guerra dos Mundos e Indiana Jones e o Reino da Caveira de Cristal. Juntos, esses filmes arrecadaram mais de US$ 3 bilhões mundialmente. Koepp também escreveu o roteiro de Jurassic World Recomeço, lançado em 2025.

Dia D é produzido pela cinco vezes indicada ao Oscar® Kristie Macosko Krieger (Os Fabelmans, Amor, Sublime Amor) e por Spielberg, pela Amblin Entertainment. Os produtores executivos são Adam Somner e Chris Brigham.

Steven Spielberg é um dos cineastas mais bem-sucedidos e influentes da indústria. O diretor de maior bilheteria de todos os tempos comandou sucessos como Tubarão, E.T. – O Extraterrestre, a franquia Indiana Jones e Jurassic Park.

Entre seus inúmeros prêmios, Spielberg é três vezes vencedor do Oscar®, incluindo Melhor Direção e Melhor Filme por A Lista de Schindler — que conquistou sete estatuetas, e Melhor Direção por O Resgate do Soldado Ryan. Seu filme mais recente, Os Fabelmans, foi lançado pela Universal em 2022 e recebeu sete indicações ao Oscar®, incluindo Direção, Roteiro Original, Melhor Atriz e Melhor Filme.

Enquanto explorávamos o mundo do Minecraft, descobrimos um desafio incrível: a cada passo nosso personagem fica maior! No começo somos pequenos, mas conforme andamos pelo mapa começamos a crescer cada vez mais, ficando gigantes dentro do mundo de Minecraft.

Durante a aventura enfrentamos monstros perigosos, obstáculos difíceis e lugares misteriosos, enquanto tentamos controlar nosso tamanho cada vez maior. Quanto mais andamos, mais gigantes ficamos, o que deixa tudo ainda mais caótico e divertido.

Será que vamos conseguir sobreviver gigantes no Minecraft ou nosso tamanho vai acabar causando problemas?

Assista até o final para ver até onde conseguimos crescer no Minecraft!

tags: Pablo Peixoto|Qu4tro Coisas|quatro coisas|4 coisas|Nerd|notícias|geek|canal quatro coisas|reação|reagindo|crítica|review|resenha|Disney Plus|HBOMax|Disney +|Netflix|globoplay|globo|assistir|completo|dublado|Cultura pop|Cinema|Musica|Opinião|react|Curiosidades|Nostalgia|Notícias|News|Dicas|Lançamento|Vídeo|Games|Vlog|cultura pop|cultura geek|nostalgia anos 80|nostalgia anos 90|crítica de filmes|carlinhos brother|séries clássicas|bastidores da tv|cultura nerd
description:
Rumores sobre um suposto trailer vazado de Spider-Man Brand New Day começaram a circular nas redes sociais e em comunidades de fãs, levantando dúvidas sobre a autenticidade do material. Como acontece frequentemente com grandes produções da Marvel Studios e da Sony Pictures, vídeos editados por fãs, montagens e supostos leaks aparecem antes de qualquer divulgação oficial. O interesse em Spider-Man Brand New Day é enorme porque o filme pode continuar a história de Peter Parker após os eventos de Spider-Man No Way Home, além de potencialmente introduzir novos personagens e caminhos para o Universo Cinematográfico Marvel. Portais especializados costumam analisar se esses vazamentos têm origem em materiais promocionais reais, testes de marketing ou apenas montagens feitas com cenas de outros filmes do MCU.
O trailer vazado de Spider-Man Brand New Day é real?
De onde surgiu o suposto trailer de Brand New Day?
A Marvel Studios comentou o vazamento do trailer?
Spider-Man Brand New Day já tem trailer oficial?
Tom Holland retorna como Peter Parker no novo filme?
Quando a Sony Pictures costuma lançar trailers de filmes do Homem-Aranha?
O trailer vazado pode ser uma montagem feita por fãs?
Quais personagens podem aparecer em Spider-Man Brand New Day?
Brand New Day será continuação direta de No Way Home?
Leaks de trailers da Marvel costumam ser verdadeiros?
#spiderman #homemaranha #brandnewday #marvel #marvelstudios #tomholland #mcu #rumores
Fontes: ComicBook.com, ScreenRant, Collider, CBR
Qu4troCoisas é um canal brasileiro de entretenimento, análise crítica e cultura pop criado por Pablo Peixoto o auto-proclamado youtuber que mais trabalha no Brasil. No ar desde 2011, o canal conquistou notoriedade ao apresentar conteúdos com um formato original e provocativo: em cada episódio, exploramos quatro elementos relacionados a um tema — o que é bom, o que é ruim, o que acabou e o que está surgindo. Daí o nome: Qu4troCoisas.

Com uma abordagem irreverente e cheia de opinião, o canal fala sobre filmes, séries, games, quadrinhos, música, brinquedos, nostalgia e fenômenos do momento. Além disso, o canal também conta com quadros autorais e personagens marcantes, como o infame executivo Carlinhos Brother, uma sátira ácida das decisões absurdas da indústria do entretenimento.

Com vídeos lançados com frequência, Qu4troCoisas também é um espaço para debates culturais, histórias esquecidas da mídia brasileira, análises de comportamento, e cobertura de tendências e polêmicas da cultura geek e pop.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

title: Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core - Release Date Trailer
tags: pc|console|steam|xbox|playstation|ps4|shooter|fps|action|adventure|explore|exploration|dwarf|dwarfs|dwarves|scifi|sci-fi|science fiction|game|spaceship|gun|weapon|gatling|minigun|drill|underground|planet|asteroid|mining|drilling|excavation|enemy|alien|monster|co-op|co-operative|low-poly|procedural
description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------

description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

description:

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is only in theaters April 1.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of Super Mario Bros., and follows The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which was released in 2023 and earned more than $1.3 billion worldwide. Both the 2023 film and The Super Mario Galaxy Movie are produced by Chris Meledandri of Illumination and Shigeru Miyamoto of Nintendo.
 
The film will be co-financed by Universal Pictures and Nintendo and will be released worldwide by Universal Pictures.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by returning filmmakers Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, from a screenplay by returning screenwriter Matthew Fogel, with Brian Tyler returning to compose the score.

description:
In this episode we make one big final push to setup our base infrastructure so that we will be resource ready for our big mini-game project. This includes building our general purpose tree farm, villager trading hall, finishing the wither skeleton slabbing, basalt generator, cactus farm, amethyst farm, and mushroom farm.

We experiment with adding some more challenging side-path parkour to the base. We look into how we will be setting up various conveyor belts around the base. This is also the big day for the 3rd Nautilus race that Cubfan has organized with his team of builders.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

title: Hermitcraft S11#7: Pop-Up Conveyor Belts
tags: Minecraft|Minecraft Lets Play|Minecraft LP|Minecraft Gameplay|Minecraft Game|Etho|Minecraft Mods|Minecraft Building|HermitCraft|Game|Minecraft Multiplayer|Hermit|Server|Hermitcraft Season 11|Season 11|Cyberpunk|Nautilus Race|Tree Farm|Amethyst Farm|Villagers|Villager Trading Hall|Conveyor Belt
description:
In this episode we make one big final push to setup our base infrastructure so that we will be resource ready for our big mini-game project. This includes building our general purpose tree farm, villager trading hall, finishing the wither skeleton slabbing, basalt generator, cactus farm, amethyst farm, and mushroom farm.

We experiment with adding some more challenging side-path parkour to the base. We look into how we will be setting up various conveyor belts around the base. This is also the big day for the 3rd Nautilus race that Cubfan has organized with his team of builders.

title: Official Launch Trailer | Crimson Desert
tags: crimson desert|붉은사막|pearl abyss|펄어비스|紅の砂漠|红色沙漠|赤血沙漠|launch|release|trailer|launching|official|출시|런칭|트레일러|gameplay|new
description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

The Official Video for "If I Don't Leave I'm Gonna Stay" by Carly Pearce (ft. Riley Green)

GRAMMY, CMA & ACM Award-winning Country star Carly Pearce teams up with Riley Green for their epic new duet “If I Don’t Leave I’m Gonna Stay.” The song brims with will they/won’t they tension, following a magnetic pair who can’t quite seem to give each other up. tags: pc|console|steam|xbox|playstation|ps4|shooter|fps|action|adventure|explore|exploration|dwarf|dwarfs|dwarves|scifi|sci-fi|science fiction|game|spaceship|gun|weapon|gatling|minigun|drill|underground|planet|asteroid|mining|drilling|excavation|enemy|alien|monster|co-op|co-operative|low-poly|procedural
description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

In diesen Zeiten, in denen viele das Gefühl haben, dass es mit der Welt bergab geht, möchten wir der bedrückten Stimmung mit „Die Show muss weitergehen“ etwas entgegensetzen. title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

description:
https://www.playstation.com/games/crimson-desert/
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5. 
Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Ich habe keine Angst

Ich halt mich selbst im Labyrinth gefangen
Such verzweifelt nach nem Loch durch das ich fliehen kann
Will nur weit weit weit weit weg
Will nur raus aus meinem Versteck 
Doch ich lass nicht zu, dass mich der Schmerz erdrückt
Weil es mein Gegengift dafür längst gibt
Ganz egal wie tief ich fall
Ich bin nicht mehr allein
Ich hör die Musik
Und habe keine Angst
Ganz egal ob mein Herz weint
auf Tränenwellen treibt
Ich hör die Musik
Und habe keine Angst
Ich habe keine Angst
Ich kann so oft nicht mal mich selbst verstehen
Keine Fußspuren im Sand an meiner Seite sehen
 
Doch da gibt gibt gibt es dich
Wisch meine Tränen vom Gesicht
 
Um im grauen Nebel helles Licht zu sehen
brauch ich nur den Klang aus unseren Kehlen

Auch wenn der Sturm mich jagt     
das letzte Licht erlischt
Ich habe keine Angst - keine Angst
Wenn mich der Zweifel frisst
und mir die Hoffnung fehlt 
Ich habe keine Angst - keine Angst

title: Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core - Release Date Trailer
tags: pc|console|steam|xbox|playstation|ps4|shooter|fps|action|adventure|explore|exploration|dwarf|dwarfs|dwarves|scifi|sci-fi|science fiction|game|spaceship|gun|weapon|gatling|minigun|drill|underground|planet|asteroid|mining|drilling|excavation|enemy|alien|monster|co-op|co-operative|low-poly|procedural
description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: BAGARRE – Bande-annonce – Nassim Lyes (2026)
description:
Un film de Julien Royal avec Nassim Lyes, Anaïde Rozam, Ramzy Bedia, Hedi Bouchenafa, Arriles Amrani, Matthieu Longatte, Mathias Quivigier, Marina Foïs, Hatik, Audrey Lamy, Hakim Jemili, Ramal, Lamine Ba, Yvan Naubron, Ichem Bougheraba, Eliott Doyle, Paul Deby, Idir Azougli, Manon Azem, Eva Huault, Greg yega, Elams et Farah Nitshaa. Le 15 avril 2026 au cinéma.

Naim est un amour dans la vie et un monstre quand il s’agit de se battre. Pour soigner sa chienne malade il est contraint d’intégrer « Allo Bagarre » un service de combattants de rue qui règlent les embrouilles à coups de poings. Mais le jour où il comprendra que les conflits se règlent par le dialogue, Naim aura bien du mal à se faire entendre.

Date de sortie : le 15 avril 2026 au cinéma.

description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

title: Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core - Release Date Trailer
tags: pc|console|steam|xbox|playstation|ps4|shooter|fps|action|adventure|explore|exploration|dwarf|dwarfs|dwarves|scifi|sci-fi|science fiction|game|spaceship|gun|weapon|gatling|minigun|drill|underground|planet|asteroid|mining|drilling|excavation|enemy|alien|monster|co-op|co-operative|low-poly|procedural
description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help!

title: P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV
tags: P1Harmony|피원하모니|P1H|HARMONY|기호|테오|지웅|인탁|소울|종섭|KEEHO|THEO|JIUNG|INTAK|SOUL|JONGSEOB|KPOP|IDOL|퍼포먼스|케이팝|아이돌
description:
P1Harmony (피원하모니) - ‘UNIQUE’ MV

[Apple Music] : https://music.apple.com/us/album/unique-ep/1878335259
[Melon] : https://www.melon.com/album/detail.htm?albumId=12914348
[Spotify] : https://open.spotify.com/album/71EVZx82GopCyTNRZVkZSk

그룹 P1Harmony (피원하모니)가 아홉 번째 미니 앨범 ‘UNIQUE’로 컴백했다. 

미니 9집 ‘UNIQUE’는 파업을 선언했던 HERO 피원하모니가 다시 영웅으로 복귀하기까지의 여정을 그린 앨범이다. 결국 영웅일 수밖에 없는 운명을 지닌 피원하모니는 고민과 선택의 과정을 거치며 성장하고, 또 성숙해진다. 신보에는 스스로가 영웅임을 받아들이며 성장해 나가는 HERO 피원하모니의 서사가 담겼다. 

동명의 타이틀곡 ‘UNIQUE’는 Brazilian Funk 특유의 강렬한 사운드와 묵직한 드럼 비트가 돋보이는 곡이다. 컨셉추얼한 트랙과 중독적인 후렴구는 Crew에 대한 넘치는 자신감을 여과 없이 보여 주며, 함께하는 것만으로 무엇도 두려울 것이 없다는 단단한 유대의 메시지를 담은 가사를 통해 P1Harmony만의 역동적인 에너지를 전한다. 

이 곡의 에너지와 메시지는 퍼포먼스를 통해 더욱 입체적으로 확장된다. Brazilian Funk 특유의 그루브 위에 피원하모니만의 개성이 어우러진 퍼포먼스는, 핸드 사인으로 시작되는 인트로부터 몰입도를 끌어올린다. 또한 아프로 댄스를 기반으로 한 안무는 파워풀하면서도 절제된 무드로 곡의 매력을 극대화한다. 특히 후렴구 ‘My crew UNIQUE’ 파트에서는 멤버들이 직접 참여한 동작과 개성 있는 제스처가 더해져, 피원하모니만의 독보적인 색을 또렷하게 드러낸다.

‘UNIQUE’ 뮤직비디오는 운명을 받아들이고 각성하는 피원하모니의 모습을 중심으로 그려진다. 영웅의 귀환을 주제로 다루지만, 정의감 넘치는 이미지가 아닌 피원하모니가 재해석한 영웅상을 제시하며 이들의 유니크함을 각인시킨다. 각성의 순간을 초월적인 비주얼로 풀어내며, 피원하모니만의 영웅 서사를 완성한다. 

신보에는 타이틀곡 외에도 업 비트 일렉트로닉 댄스곡 ‘Pandemonium’, 피원하모니의 귀여운 플러팅을 담은 가사가 어우러진 ‘L.O.Y.L.’, 풍부한 보컬 하모니가 깊은 인상을 주는 ‘Wednesday Girl’, 피원하모니의 당당한 태도를 엿볼 수 있는 힙합 댄스곡 ‘Triple 7’, 그룹의 존재감을 거침없이 드러내는 힙합 장르의 곡 ‘ICE (VVS)’까지 총 6곡이 수록됐다. 

이번 앨범에서도 피원하모니는 전곡 크레딧에 이름을 올리며 자신들만의 음악 세계를 구축한다. 인탁과 종섭은 타이틀곡을 포함한 전곡 작사에 참여했고, 기호와 지웅 역시 작사에 힘을 보태며 그룹 고유의 정체성을 완성했다.

피원하모니는 늘 새로운 음악과 새로운 무대를 향해 나아간다. 그리고 그 중심에는 언제나 ‘피원하모니다워야 한다’는 확고한 다짐이 있다. 매 앨범 자신들만의 색을 또렷하게 확장해 온 피원하모니. 미니 9집 ‘UNIQUE’는 말 그대로 유니크한 지금의 피원하모니를 가장 선명하게 보여 주는 앨범이 될 것이다.

P1Harmony has returned with their ninth mini album “UNIQUE.” 

The ninth mini album “UNIQUE” followsthe journey of HERO P1Harmony, who had declared a strike, as they return to their roles as heroes. Bound by a destiny that calls them to heroism, P1Harmony grows and matures through moments of reflection and choice. The new album captures the narrative of HERO P1Harmony embracing their identity as heroes and evolving along the way. 

The title track “UNIQUE” features the intense sound of Brazilian Funk driven by powerful drum beats. The conceptual track and addictive chorus confidently showcase their overflowing pride in their Crew, while the lyrics deliver a message of an unbreakable bond; together, there is nothing to fear. The track encapsulates P1Harmony’s dynamic energy. 

The energy and message of this track are further elevated through performance. The performance, which blends P1Harmony’s unique style with the distinctive groove of Brazilian Funk, draws audiences in from the very first moment with a hand-sign introduction. The choreography, rooted in Afro dance, maximizes the song's appeal with its powerful yet controlled mood. The “My crew UNIQUE” chorus line especially stands out, featuring member-created movements and distinctive gestures that clearly showcase P1Harmony’s unmistakable identity.

The “UNIQUE” music video portrays P1Harmony as they awaken to and embrace their destiny. With the story of hero’s return, the video presents P1Harmony’s reinterpretation of what a hero looks like rather than a typical justice-driven image, leaving a lasting impression of their uniqueness. The moment of awakening is expressed through transcendent visuals, completing P1Harmony’s hero narrative. 

In addition to the title track, the new album includes six songs in total: the upbeat electronic dance track “Pandemonium”; “L.O.Y.L.,” featuring lyrics that capture P1Harmony’s playful flirting; “Wednesday Girl,” highlighted by rich vocal harmonies; the hip-hop dance track “Triple 7,” showcasing P1Harmony’s confident attitude; and the hip-hop track “ICE (VVS),” which boldly displays the group’s commanding presence. 

P1Harmony is credited across every track, building their own musical universe. INTAK and JONGSEOB wrote lyrics for all songs, including the title track, while KEEHO and JIUNG also contributed to completing the group’s distinct identity. 

P1Harmony continues to move toward, embracing new music and new stages. At the core of their journey lies an unwavering commitment staying in harmony with who they are as P1Harmony.  Having consistently expanded their musical identity with each album, P1Harmony’s ninth mini album “UNIQUE” stands as the album that most vividly captures P1Harmony’s true identity of today.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.
